description_long: This is a modern Philips hair dryer with a sleek, predominantly black body accented by bright orange-red trim around the nozzle and air intake. The main cylindrical body is slightly flattened and tapers toward the handle, which is ergonomically curved for comfortable grip. The nozzle is circular and integrated, with a smooth, narrow opening designed for focused airflow. The rear features a circular air intake grill with a pattern of evenly spaced holes, surrounded by an orange-red ring. A visible power cord extends from the base of the handle, and a control button is located on the side of the main body. The surface is glossy and hard, reflecting light and giving the appliance a polished, professional appearance.
description: A sleek black and orange-red Philips hair dryer with a curved handle, circular nozzle, and visible power cord. The design is modern, glossy, and ergonomic.
description_view_0: The hair dryer is seen from the nozzle end, showing the circular orange-red rim and the narrow, focused opening.
description_view_1: The side view displays the Philips logo, the control button on the main body, and the full length of the handle and cord.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the orange-red ring and the circular air intake grill with a pattern of holes.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the smooth, glossy black surface and the orange-red trim at the nozzle and base.
attribute_nozzle_design: The nozzle is circular, integrated, and slightly narrow, designed for concentrated airflow with a smooth, seamless finish. It is not removable and is accented by a distinctive orange-red ring.
attribute_air_intake_grill_pattern: The air intake grill features a pattern of evenly spaced circular holes arranged concentrically within an orange-red ring.
attribute_handle_orientation: The handle is angled downward from the main body, forming an ergonomic, nearly perpendicular orientation.
